steps.title: Modify the noun directly
steps.content: The blank follows the noun profile and must attach directly to it before the phrase about the Navajo Times. A participle can form the needed modifier: a profile appearing in the newspaper.

steps.title: Reject finite verbs
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D are finite verb forms. Without a relative pronoun such as that, those forms cannot directly modify profile inside the larger sentence. The answer is A.
